tool.name: ALNchain
tool.description: filter .1aln alignments into one-to-one global chains

param.name: input
param.label: Input .1aln alignment file
param.help: A .1aln file produced by FastGA. In the FastGA tool, select the '1aln (-1)' output format to generate one.

param.name: max_gap
param.label: Maximum gap size between consecutive alignments (bp)
param.help: Upper bound on the gap allowed between two consecutive alignments in a chain. Larger values join more distant alignments into a single chain.

param.name: max_overlap
param.label: Maximum overlap size between consecutive alignments (bp)
param.help: Upper bound on how much two consecutive alignments in a chain may overlap.

param.name: gap_penalty
param.label: Gap penalty coefficient
param.help: Per-base penalty applied to gaps when scoring a chain: a gap of size G costs p*G.

param.name: overlap_penalty
param.label: Overlap penalty coefficient
param.help: Per-base penalty applied to overlaps when scoring a chain: an overlap of size O costs q*O.

param.name: score_drop
param.label: Score drop threshold for breaking a chain
param.help: A chain is broken when its running score drops by more than this value.

param.name: min_chain_score
param.label: Minimum chain score
param.help: Chains whose score (C - G*p - O*q) is below this value are discarded.

param.name: min_chain_count
param.label: Minimum number of alignment fragments per chain
param.help: Chains containing fewer alignment fragments than this are discarded.

param.name: chain_coverage
param.label: Maximum chain coverage (fraction of chain size)
param.help: A chain is discarded if it is already covered by previously selected chains by more than this fraction of its own length.

param.name: seq_coverage
param.label: Minimum extension (fraction of sequence size)
param.help: A chain must contribute new coverage of at least this fraction of the sequence length to be kept. 0 disables the filter.

param.name: close_gap_limit
param.label: Maximum gap for fuzzy merge (bp)
param.help: When tracking positions already covered by selected chains, gaps up to this size are treated as covered.

tool.help:
For each pair of sequences, ALNchain post-processes a ``.1aln`` alignment file produced by FastGA to generate a subset of alignments forming a one-to-one global alignment (allowing rearrangements), by selecting the best-scored local chains under user-specified constraints.
A *chain* is a sequence of collinear alignments between two contigs. ALNchain uses a linear gap penalty for chaining: the cost of a gap or overlap between consecutive alignments is set by ``-p`` and ``-q``, and the maximum gap and overlap sizes allowed in a chain are bounded by ``-g`` and ``-l``. Chains are scored as ``C - G*p - O*q``, where ``C`` is the total number of unique sequence positions covered by the alignments. A chain is broken if its running score drops by more than ``-z``.
Chains are then selected by score, highest first. The ``-s`` and ``-n`` options set the minimum score and the minimum number of alignment fragments required for a chain to be considered. For each candidate chain, ALNchain computes the number of additional positions it covers on the sequences relative to the chains already selected; if that number is below ``-c`` times the chain size, or below ``-e`` times the sequence size, the chain is rejected. When tracking covered positions, ``-f`` is used as the upper limit for closing gaps (fuzzy merge).
-----
Input *****
A single ``.1aln`` dataset (for example the ``1aln`` output of the FastGA tool). The ``.1aln`` format is the compact ONEcode binary produced by FastGA.
-----
Options *******
**Chain construction and scoring**
===================================== ======== =========== **Option** **Flag** **Default** ------------------------------------- -------- ----------- Maximum gap size -g 10000 Maximum overlap size -l 10000 Gap penalty coefficient -p 0.1 Overlap penalty coefficient -q 0.1 Score drop threshold for breaking -z 1000 ===================================== ======== ===========
**Chain selection**
===================================== ======== =========== **Option** **Flag** **Default** ------------------------------------- -------- ----------- Minimum chain score -s 10000 Minimum alignment fragments per chain -n 1 Maximum coverage (fraction of chain) -c 0.5 Minimum extension (fraction of seq.) -e 0.0 Maximum gap for fuzzy merge -f 1000 ===================================== ======== ===========
-----
Output ******
A filtered ``.1aln`` file containing only the selected chains. On small or simple inputs where every alignment already satisfies the defaults, the output may look nearly identical to the input; ALNchain only appends a provenance line to the file header in that case.
